typecheck.detail: no issues found in 44 source files

appliedUpdates.description: Created .factory/library/runtime-path-resolution.md documenting TG_RG_PATH and TG_RG_BINARY env var overrides, runtime path resolution strategy, and rg_passthrough module promotion.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding a note that rg_passthrough is now a public library module (pub mod in lib.rs). Workers modifying its API surface should be aware this is visible to external crate consumers, not just main.rs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature runtime-binary-path-resolution promoted rg_passthrough from private mod in main.rs to pub mod in lib.rs for testability. This changes the module visibility contract.
